features.name: KNIME Application
features.description: Provides an integrated KNIME analytics platform view within Datagrok, accessible from the Compute browse path, with a tree browser for navigating KNIME resources.
features.evidence_summary: KNIME (role: app, browsePath: Compute) and knimeLinkAppTreeBrowser (role: appTreeBrowser) share the KNIME name prefix and together constitute the integrated app UI entry point.

features.name: KNIME Workflow Execution
features.description: Discovers KNIME deployments, registers them as callable Datagrok functions, and retrieves workflow preview images, enabling users to run KNIME workflows from within Datagrok.
features.evidence_summary: knimeListDeployments, knimeGetOrRegisterFunc, and knimeGetWorkflowImageUrl share the knime prefix and together implement the deployment-discovery → dynamic-function-registration → preview pipeline.

features.name: Plugin Initialization
features.description: Autostart hook that registers KnimeLink functions on Datagrok startup, wiring up the KNIME integration before any user interaction.
features.evidence_summary: knimeLinkAutostart carries role 'autostart' and description 'KnimeLink function registration', unambiguously an infrastructure initialization entry point.
